subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! Thy letter which thou didst send unto Jináb-i-Javád, upon him be the Glory of God, hath been presented in the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین نامه شما که بجناب جواد علیه بهائی ارسال نمودی در ساحت اقدس حاضر و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
